findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Reflected XSS - HTTP request parameter to response output
 * @description User-controlled input from HTTP request written directly to HTTP response without encoding
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/reflected-xss-dspace
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module XSSConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (
        mc.getMethod().hasName("print") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("println") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("write")
      ) and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "Writer") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("write") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "OutputStream") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0)
    )
  }
}

module XSSFlow = TaintTracking::Global<XSSConfig>;
import XSSFlow::PathGraph

from XSSFlow::PathNode source, XSSFlow::PathNode sink
where XSSFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Potential XSS: data from $@ flows to HTTP response output.", source.getNode(), "user-controlled input"
findings.hypothesis: HTTP request parameter flows to response output without encoding (reflected XSS)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XSS via sendRedirect with user-controlled data
 * @description User-controlled input used in HTTP redirect without encoding may allow XSS in some browsers
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xss-redirect
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module RedirectXSSConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("sendRedirect") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("setHeader") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(1)
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("addHeader") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(1)
    )
  }
}

module RedirectXSSFlow = TaintTracking::Global<RedirectXSSConfig>;
import RedirectXSSFlow::PathGraph

from RedirectXSSFlow::PathNode source, RedirectXSSFlow::PathNode sink
where RedirectXSSFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Potential XSS via HTTP redirect/header with user input from $@.", source.getNode(), "user input"
findings.hypothesis: User input reflected in sendRedirect or response headers (XSS in redirect)

message.text: Potential XSS via HTTP redirect/header with user input from [user input](1).

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Unencoded user input in HTML output from servlet tag/jsptag classes
 * @description ItemTag, BrowseListTag, ItemListTag writing user metadata without encoding
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xss-browse-item-tags
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module BrowseTagXSSConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Metadata values from DSpace items (could contain stored XSS)
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("getMetadataByMetadataString") or
      mc.getMethod().hasName("getMetadata") or
      mc.getMethod().hasName("getValue") or
      mc.getMethod().hasName("getFirstMetadataValue")
    |
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
    or
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("print") or mc.getMethod().hasName("println") or mc.getMethod().hasName("write")) and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "Writer") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0) and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.dspace.app.webui.jsptag.%")
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("append") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "AbstractStringBuilder") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0) and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.dspace.app.webui.jsptag.%")
    )
  }
}

module BrowseTagXSSFlow = TaintTracking::Global<BrowseTagXSSConfig>;
import BrowseTagXSSFlow::PathGraph

from BrowseTagXSSFlow::PathNode source, BrowseTagXSSFlow::PathNode sink
where BrowseTagXSSFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Potential XSS in JSPUI browse/item tag: data from $@ flows unencoded to HTML output.", source.getNode(), "item metadata"
findings.hypothesis: Item metadata values written to HTML output in JSP tag classes without encoding (stored XSS)

message.text:
Potential XSS in JSPUI browse/item tag: data from [item metadata](1) flows unencoded to HTML output.
Potential XSS in JSPUI browse/item tag: data from [item metadata](2) flows unencoded to HTML output.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Direct HTTP request parameter to sendRedirect without validation
 * @description HTTP request parameter directly passed to sendRedirect enables open redirect and header injection XSS
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/direct-redirect-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from MethodCall redirectCall, MethodCall getParamCall
where
  redirectCall.getMethod().hasName("sendRedirect") and
  redirectCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
  (
    getParamCall.getMethod().hasName("getParameter") or
    getParamCall.getMethod().hasName("getHeader") or
    getParamCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURI") or
    getParamCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURL") or
    getParamCall.getMethod().hasName("getQueryString") or
    getParamCall.getMethod().hasName("getPathInfo")
  ) and
  DataFlow::localFlow(DataFlow::exprNode(getParamCall), DataFlow::exprNode(redirectCall.getArgument(0)))
select redirectCall, "HTTP redirect using request data (" + getParamCall.getMethod().getName() + ") without validation - potential XSS/open redirect"
findings.hypothesis: Direct unvalidated request parameter flows to sendRedirect

message.text: HTTP redirect using request data (getParameter) without validation - potential XSS/open redirect
HTTP redirect using request data (getParameter) without validation - potential XSS/open redirect

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XSS via request URI/path reflected in redirect - DAVLookup and Cocoon
 * @description Request URI used in sendRedirect enables header injection XSS
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xss-uri-redirect
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from MethodCall redirectCall, MethodCall requestDataCall
where
  redirectCall.getMethod().hasName("sendRedirect") and
  redirectCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
  (
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURI") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURL") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getPathInfo") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getServletPath") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getQueryString")
  ) and
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(requestDataCall), DataFlow::exprNode(redirectCall.getArgument(0)))
select redirectCall, "HTTP redirect with request URI/path data (" + requestDataCall.getMethod().getName() + "()) in " + redirectCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + " - potential header injection/XSS"
findings.hypothesis: Request URI reflected in HTTP redirect enabling header injection/XSS

message.text: HTTP redirect with request URI/path data (getRequestURI()) in DSpaceCocoonServletFilter - potential header injection/XSS

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name User input in XMLUI Cocoon filter redirect - open redirect and XSS
 * @description DSpaceCocoonServletFilter uses request URI/parameters in sendRedirect without validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xss-cocoon-filter-redirect
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find all redirect calls in the xmlui package that use request data
from MethodCall redirectCall, MethodCall requestDataCall
where
  redirectCall.getMethod().hasName("sendRedirect") and
  redirectCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
  redirectCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.dspace.app.xmlui%") and
  (
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURI") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURL") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getParameter") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getPathInfo") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getQueryString") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getHeader")
  ) and
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(requestDataCall), DataFlow::exprNode(redirectCall.getArgument(0)))
select redirectCall, "Redirect in XMLUI using '" + requestDataCall.getMethod().getName() + "()' in " + redirectCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + redirectCall.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " - potential XSS/open redirect"
findings.hypothesis: XMLUI components using request data in sendRedirect without validation

message.text: Redirect in XMLUI using 'getParameter()' in BitstreamReader.setup - potential XSS/open redirect
Redirect in XMLUI using 'getRequestURI()' in DSpaceCocoonServletFilter.doFilter - potential XSS/open redirect
Redirect in XMLUI using 'getParameter()' in ItemExportDownloadReader.setup - potential XSS/open redirect

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Unvalidated redirect using request parameter - open redirect enabling XSS
 * @description Specific confirmed cases of unvalidated redirect parameters in DSpace servlets
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/unvalidated-redirect-xss
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find ALL sendRedirect calls that use any tainted request data - broader set
from MethodCall redirectCall, MethodCall requestDataCall
where
  redirectCall.getMethod().hasName("sendRedirect") and
  redirectCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
  (
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getParameter") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getHeader") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURI") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURL") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getQueryString") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getPathInfo") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getServletPath")
  ) and
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(requestDataCall), DataFlow::exprNode(redirectCall.getArgument(0)))
select redirectCall,
  "sendRedirect() with unvalidated user input (" + requestDataCall.getMethod().getName() + "()) in " +
  redirectCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." +
  redirectCall.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + "() at line " +
  redirectCall.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: All unvalidated redirects using request data across the codebase

message.text: sendRedirect() with unvalidated user input (getParameter()) in ControlledVocabularyServlet.doDSGet() at line 53
sendRedirect() with unvalidated user input (getParameter()) in SearchResultLogServlet.doDSPost() at line 71
sendRedirect() with unvalidated user input (getParameter()) in BitstreamReader.setup() at line 271
sendRedirect() with unvalidated user input (getRequestURI()) in DSpaceCocoonServletFilter.doFilter() at line 258
sendRedirect() with unvalidated user input (getParameter()) in ItemExportDownloadReader.setup() at line 108

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XSS via response body with user-controlled content-type or filename
 * @description User-controlled filenames or content-types set on response headers without sanitization
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xss-content-disposition-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from MethodCall headerCall, MethodCall requestDataCall
where
  (
    headerCall.getMethod().hasName("setHeader") or
    headerCall.getMethod().hasName("addHeader") or
    headerCall.getMethod().hasName("setContentType")
  ) and
  headerCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
  (
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getParameter") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getHeader") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getPathInfo")
  ) and
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(requestDataCall), DataFlow::exprNode(headerCall.getAnArgument())) and
  // Only header value arg (not header name)
  (
    headerCall.getMethod().hasName("setContentType") or
    (
      (headerCall.getMethod().hasName("setHeader") or headerCall.getMethod().hasName("addHeader")) and
      TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(requestDataCall), DataFlow::exprNode(headerCall.getArgument(1)))
    )
  )
select headerCall,
  "Response header set with user-controlled value from " + requestDataCall.getMethod().getName() + "() in " +
  headerCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + " - potential header injection"
findings.hypothesis: User input in response headers enables header injection/XSS

message.text: Response header set with user-controlled value from getParameter() in MetadataExportServlet - potential header injection
Response header set with user-controlled value from getParameter() in MyDSpaceServlet - potential header injection

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Stored XSS via metadata value in HTML output - JSPUI item display
 * @description Database-stored metadata values written to HTML output without encoding in item display tags
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/stored-xss-metadata-html
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-080
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

module StoredXSSConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Metadata values from database
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getMetadataByMetadataString") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getFirstMetadataValue") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getName") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getMetadata")
      ) and
      (
        mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("org.dspace.content", "DSpaceObject") or
        mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.dspace.content", "Metadatum") or
        mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.dspace.content", "Collection") or
        mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.dspace.content", "Community") or
        mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.dspace.content", "Item")
      ) and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("print") or mc.getMethod().hasName("println") or mc.getMethod().hasName("write")) and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "Writer") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0) and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.dspace.app.webui.jsptag.%")
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("append") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "AbstractStringBuilder") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0) and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.dspace.app.webui.jsptag.%")
    )
  }
}

module StoredXSSFlow = TaintTracking::Global<StoredXSSConfig>;
import StoredXSSFlow::PathGraph

from StoredXSSFlow::PathNode source, StoredXSSFlow::PathNode sink
where StoredXSSFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Potential stored XSS: metadata value from $@ flows to HTML output without encoding.", source.getNode(), "database metadata"
findings.hypothesis: Stored XSS via metadata values written to HTML output in JSPUI tag classes without encoding

message.text: Potential stored XSS: metadata value from [database metadata](1) flows to HTML output without encoding.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name User input in response Content-Disposition header - header injection
 * @description User-controlled filenames injected into Content-Disposition header without sanitization
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/header-injection-content-disposition
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from MethodCall headerCall, MethodCall requestDataCall
where
  (
    headerCall.getMethod().hasName("setHeader") or
    headerCall.getMethod().hasName("addHeader")
  ) and
  headerCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.servlet.http", "HttpServletResponse") and
  // Is a Content-Disposition header
  exists(StringLiteral sl |
    (sl.getValue().toLowerCase() = "content-disposition" or
     sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%content-disposition%")) and
    (headerCall.getArgument(0) = sl or
     DataFlow::localFlow(DataFlow::exprNode(sl), DataFlow::exprNode(headerCall.getArgument(0))))
  ) and
  (
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getParameter") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getHeader") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getPathInfo") or
    requestDataCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURI")
  ) and
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(requestDataCall), DataFlow::exprNode(headerCall.getArgument(1)))
select headerCall,
  "Content-Disposition header set with user-controlled value from " + requestDataCall.getMethod().getName() +
  "() in " + headerCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() +
  " - potential header injection/XSS"
findings.hypothesis: User-controlled values injected into Content-Disposition response header

message.text: Content-Disposition header set with user-controlled value from getParameter() in MetadataExportServlet - potential header injection/XSS
Content-Disposition header set with user-controlled value from getParameter() in MyDSpaceServlet - potential header injection/XSS
